sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zingsang phalvak tung in, Vansang dawn pan in,
Ni simin lungnop na ka ngah hi Mual sangdawn leh guam sung,
Topa hong it na in kikhel ngei lo

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zankim lai a hi zong, Ih Pa'anglim nuai ah,
Lungnop kicing hauhna ka ngah hi,
Topa' hong itna in kicing den hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa aw hong phat ning, a tawntung in,
Nisim naisim kong phat zong tul ngeilo ding,
Nong itna lian in kikhel ngeilo a tawntung
Topa hong hehpih na lian lua sang.
